title: App-context terminology entry
description: Frontmatter of app-context/src/terminology/<slug>.md. Defines preferred and discouraged wording for a concept within Actian products.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier for the terminology entry; used as the filename (minus .md) and cross-reference target.

use.description: The preferred, canonical term to use in Actian product UI and documentation.

meaning.description: Brief definition explaining what this term means in the context of Actian products.
examples: A configured sequence of data transformation steps executed as a single unit.

notUse.description: Discouraged synonyms or alternative phrasings that should not appear in UI copy or docs.
